creator: alexey@ocaml.nl
text: FreeBSD contains smlnj 110.98 from 2020. However, the latest available version, according to https://smlnj.org/ is 110.99.6.1 from October 2024. According to changelogs, there were multiple bugfixes and minor improvements since 110.98. Having the FreeBSD package updated to the new version would be very nice. Straightforward updating the version in the port's Makefile does not work.
